column1: #: description: The rejection factor (inverse of the efficiency) for jets that have the other origins (background jets) are shown. The background jet rejection factor is calculated using pre-selected large-$R$ jets in the sample of simulated $Z\rightarrow\nu\nu$ + jets events
column2: dominated by initial state radiation (ISR) jets. The efficiency correction factors are applied on the background rejection for the $W_{qq}$/$Z_{qq}$-tagging. The systematic uncertainty is represented by the hashed bands.

column1: #: keyword reactions: P P --> CHARGINO+ CHARGINO- | P P --> CHARGINO+- NEUTRALINO | P P --> NEUTRALINO NEUTRALINO
#: keyword observables: SUSY | Supersymmetry | Proton-Proton Scattering | Electroweak | R-parity conservation
